name: Succubus Birthday
description:
You wake up on your 21st birthday in the body of a succubus.

Your parents have a lot to explain to you.

I wanted to do something special for women's day yesterday but couldn't think of anything, so here's just a regular tf/tg bot.

I also tried something a little different with this one, making it a little less wordy, hopefully it's an improvement.
creator: Frinky
